name: 2nd Guard Regiment Anchorage
desc: $market serves as the anchorage of the 2nd Guards Regiment of the Red Stripe Knights and maintains a powerful guard fleet.

name: Crusade Defense System
desc: This place is a node in the Forgotten Crusader Automated Defense System. The need for local crews, marines, and organs is reduced to zero and output is halved, eliminating the need for food and drugs while increasing local stability.
